name: Shopping Cart
desc: The universal icon for grocery shopping and online e-commerce. Perfect for 'add to cart' call-to-actions, retail sales, and supermarket trips.

name: Shopping Bags
desc: Represents fashion hauls, mall trips, and retail therapy. High SEO value for Black Friday, seasonal sales, and boutique brand content.

name: Shopping Price Tag
desc: Symbolizes discounts, clearance events, and pricing. Ideal for couponing blogs, promo codes, and 'best deals' announcements.

name: Shopping for Clothes
desc: Specific to apparel and fashion shopping. Great for clothing store promotions, wardrobe refreshes, and OOTD (Outfit of the Day) content.

name: Shopping for Shoes
desc: Represents luxury footwear and accessory shopping. Targeted at shoe lovers, fashionistas, and high-end retail marketing.

name: Shopping Department Store
desc: The symbol for large-scale retail buildings and malls. Used for city shopping guides and holiday shopping season content.

name: Shopping for Gifts
desc: Represents buying presents for holidays, birthdays, or weddings. Perfect for gift guides and 'shopping for others' topics.

name: Shopping Credit Card
desc: The icon for the payment stage of shopping. Essential for fintech, secure checkout discussions, and digital wallet content.

name: Shopping Delivery Box
desc: Represents the arrival of an online shopping order. Widely used for 'unboxing' videos and shipping/logistics updates.

name: Mobile Shopping
desc: Highlights the trend of shopping on smartphones. Ideal for app promotions, m-commerce stats, and convenient digital browsing.

name: Beauty Shopping
desc: Specifically for makeup and skincare hauls. Perfect for beauty influencers, salon retail, and cosmetic brand launches.

name: Convenience Shopping
desc: Represents 24/7 retail and quick stops. Used for late-night snack runs or essential convenience shopping topics.
